description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.16.0 Docker image (identified by its sha256 digest) and sets the LC_ALL variable to C.UTF-8. Define a single stage named build and a cache called purty-v1 that saves the .bazel-cache directory from the project. Add a job named Build purty in the build stage that executes the command make test BAZEL_CONFIG='--config=gitlabci'. The pipeline has no services, artifacts, or conditional rules.
